title: rpm packaging should run on any incoming PR
body:
In order to avoid breaking the packaging (rpm for now) I would like to get approval to enable running rdo-check 3rd party CI jobs on any incoming PR instead of manually triggering them using the magic `check-rdo` comment.

Me and the others from tripleo-ci team will continue to keep an eye on these jobs and be considered the maintainers of them. They run in ~5 minutes, and we could easily add extra tests if we want (now is only `make package-install`).

In fact running these jobs on each PR does mean that a failure of these jobs **would not block libpod workflow.** This only happened once accidentally while we were configuring the github integrations.

This morning we already enabled periodic runs of these jobs and you can see the full build history:

* https://review.rdoproject.org/zuul/builds?job_name=podman-package-centos-8
* https://review.rdoproject.org/zuul/builds?job_name=podman-package-fedora-30
* https://review.rdoproject.org/zuul/builds?job_name=podman-package-rhel-8

comments.body: LGTM, very good idea. We'll see how that works out but for sure it'll bring good feedback.
Sure what do we need to do?
You do not need to do anything, mainly we will activate this by merging https://review.rdoproject.org/r/#/c/24032/ -- posting it here so others may find the place that controls it.
I am closing this as it was activated few minutes ago. Feel free to reopen or comment if you spot any issues.
